channel.title: iDigital
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from iDigital, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The building legal case for global climate justice
item.description: The United States and the European Union grew into economic superpowers by committing climate atrocities. They have burned a wildly disproportionate s...

item.title: How uncrewed narco subs could transform the Colombian drug trade
item.description: On a bright morning last April, a surveillance plane operated by the Colombian military spotted a 40-foot-long shark-like silhouette idling in the oce...

item.title: Toyota Motor Manufacturing Canada to deploy Agility Robotics’ Digit humanoids
item.description: Toyota Motor Manufacturing Canada is expanding its commercial trials for Digit from three humanoids to 10. The post Toyota Motor Manufacturing Canada ...

item.title: What it takes to make agentic AI work in retail
item.description: Thank you for joining us on the “Enterprise AI hub.” In this episode of the Infosys Knowledge Institute Podcast, Dylan Cosper speaks with Prasad Banal...

item.title: The Download: autonomous narco submarines, and virtue signaling chatbots
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. How uncrewed...

item.title: NVIDIA adds Cosmos Policy to its world foundation models
item.description: Cosmos Policy is a new robot control policy that post-trains the Cosmos Predict-2 world foundation model for manipulation tasks. The post NVIDIA adds ...

item.title: Microsoft has a new plan to prove what’s real and what’s AI online
item.description: AI-enabled deception now permeates our online lives. There are the high-profile cases you may easily spot, like when White House officials recently sh...

item.title: Mitsubishi Electric follows digital-first strategy for advanced air mobility
item.description: Mitsubishi Electric United States is focused on helping companies with digital-first initiatives such as AnyMile for drone cargo management. The post ...

item.title: igus launches new RBTX online shopping experience for robotics developers
item.description: This shift to a self-serve model removes the requirement for a sales consultation, providing a streamlined experience, igus said. The post igus launch...

item.title: Ottonomy builds Ottumn.AI platform to orchestrate robots, drones, and smart infrastructure
item.description: Ottonomy built Ottumn.AI on NVIDIA's infrastructure to integrate delivery systems for healthcare, logistics, and smart cities. The post Ottonomy build...

item.title: Railway secures $100 million to challenge AWS with AI-native cloud infrastructure
item.description: Railway , a San Francisco-based cloud platform that has quietly amassed two million developers without spending a dollar on marketing, announced Thurs...

item.title: Claude Code costs up to $200 a month. Goose does the same thing for free.
item.description: The artificial intelligence coding revolution comes with a catch: it's expensive. Claude Code , Anthropic's terminal-based AI agent that can write, de...

item.title: Listen Labs raises $69M after viral billboard hiring stunt to scale AI customer interviews
item.description: Alfred Wahlforss was running out of options. His startup, Listen Labs , needed to hire over 100 engineers, but competing against Mark Zuckerberg's $10...

item.title: Salesforce rolls out new Slackbot AI agent as it battles Microsoft and Google in workplace AI
item.description: Salesforce on Tuesday launched an entirely rebuilt version of Slackbot , the company's workplace assistant, transforming it from a simple notification...

item.title: Anthropic launches Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works in your files — no coding required
item.description: Anthropic released Cowork on Monday, a new AI agent capability that extends the power of its wildly successful Claude Code tool to non-technical users...

item.title: Advance Trustworthy AI and ML, and Identify Best Practices for Scaling AI
item.description: By John P. Desmond, AI Trends Editor Advancing trustworthy AI and machine learning to mitigate agency risk is a priority for the US Department of Ener...

item.title: Best Practices for Building the AI Development Platform in Government
